title: English map of UCC Evangelion vending machines in Hakone
display_title: English map of UCC Evangelion vending machines in Hakone
wikitext: []: English map of UCC Evangelion vending machines in Hakone             Quote Post by MIxa » Thu Apr 04, 2013 6:44 pm Hi everybody. Just want to post a little thing I made. Some time ago I found a great site of UCC Eva campaign, and there was a map of Eva-branded vending machines on it. That fascinated me (I love vending very much!) but I was disappointed by not being able to find an English version of this great map. So I decided to make it by myself. And I made it. I obviously don't want it to just sit on my hard drive for nothing, therefore I want to share it with you all. Download it here if you interested. One sentence is left untranslated because I was unable to make text the same style as in the original and decided not to left large unused space. It also preserves some Japanese spirit :) If you can provide any suggestions on improving the translation - feel free to do it. I will correct the map no problem.

Article: English map of UCC Evangelion vending machines in Hakone
[]: English map of UCC Evangelion vending machines in Hakone             Quote Post by MIxa » Thu Apr 04, 2013 6:44 pm Hi everybody. Just want to post a little thing I made. Some time ago I found a great site of UCC Eva campaign, and there was a map of Eva-branded vending machines on it. That fascinated me (I love vending very much!) but I was disappointed by not being able to find an English version of this great map. So I decided to make it by myself. And I made it. I obviously don't want it to just sit on my hard drive for nothing, therefore I want to share it with you all. Download it here if you interested. One sentence is left untranslated because I was unable to make text the same style as in the original and decided not to left large unused space. It also preserves some Japanese spirit :) If you can provide any suggestions on improving the translation - feel free to do it. I will correct the map no problem.
